ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "driver_license" TEXT /* Customer's driver license number for identification */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "membership_id" TEXT /* Membership status of the customer */,
  "address_1" TEXT /* First line of the customer's address */,
  "address_2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the customer resides */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's residence */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for customer's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_membership_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_id") REFERENCES memberships ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memberships" (
  "membership_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each membership program */,
  "membership_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits provided to members */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for joining the membership program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to maintain membership */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when membership expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Staff member's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Staff member's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for staff member's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g. admin, customer_support) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer whose record is accessed */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer record was accessed */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the customer record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_access_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_access_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_membership_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership history entry */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who holds the membership */,
  "membership_id" TEXT /* ID of the membership program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the membership started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the membership ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_membership_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_membership_history_membership_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_id") REFERENCES memberships ("membership_id")
)
column_names: Customer's driver license number for identification
